title: Wooden 3D Vehicle Puzzle Police Car, Suitable for Children Aged 3+
features: Educational: Wooden 3D puzzle designed to enhance problem-solving and spatial awareness skills in children aged 3 and above.
Engaging: Assemble the pieces to construct a realistic police car model, fostering creativity and fine motor skills.
High-Quality Materials: Crafted from durable, eco-friendly wood for a safe and long-lasting play experience.
Compact Size: Convenient dimensions make it easy to store and carry, perfect for travel or playtime at home.
Skill Development: Encourages hand-eye coordination, patience, and a sense of accomplishment upon completion.
description: Product description Spark your child's creativity and problem-solving skills with this delightful 3D wooden puzzle in the shape of a police car. Crafted from high-quality wood, this engaging toy is designed to captivate young minds aged 3 and above. As they meticulously piece together the intricate parts, they'll develop fine motor skills, hand-eye coordination, and spatial awareness. The finished product is a charming police car model that can be proudly displayed or used for imaginative play. With its vibrant colours and sturdy construction, this puzzle promises hours of educational entertainment. Encourage your little one's cognitive development while fostering a love for puzzles and vehicles. Unleash their potential with this delightful wooden 3D puzzle. Safety Warning WARNING! NOT SUITABLE FOR CHILDREN UNDER 36 MONTHS. CHOKING HAZARD - SMALL PARTS. THE PACKAGING IS NOT PART OF THE TOY, AND SHOULD BE REMOVED BEFORE THE TOY IS GIVEN TO A CHILD
